overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from GTA V showing a character walking through downtown Los Santos at night. The character traverses sidewalks, crosses multi-lane streets with moderate traffic, and approaches a clinical psychology building entrance before turning back. The scene features modern glass architecture, street lighting, and palm trees typical of the game's Los Angeles-inspired setting.

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a concrete sidewalk bordered by a stone retaining wall on the left and a multi-lane road on the right. Modern glass office buildings with illuminated windows line the street. The character passes a woman in a white dress walking the opposite way and continues toward an intersection, briefly breaking into a run.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane street crossing with grassy median and palm trees

events.description: character steps off sidewalk and begins crossing the multi-lane road
character reaches grassy median and approaches building plaza

agents.ego_description: crossing the street from sidewalk to grassy median, navigating between moving traffic and palm trees

white sports car driving down the street with headlights

strip of grass and landscaping between road lanes

open paved area leading to building entrance

segments.scene_description: The character leaves the sidewalk and crosses the multi-lane asphalt road, passing between palm trees and moving vehicles including a white limousine. The scene opens up to a wide view of the street with the Didier Sachs building visible in the background. The character reaches a grassy median and approaches a plaza entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: building plaza with clinical psychology institute entrance

events.description: character reaches building entrance and stops briefly at the doors
character turns around and begins walking away from building

agents.ego_description: approaching the Harper Unit for Clinical Psychology building entrance across patterned pavement, reaching the doors, then turning around to exit

segments.scene_description: The character enters a paved plaza and approaches the entrance of the Harper Unit for Clinical Psychology building, passing by reflective glass facades. After reaching the entrance steps, the character turns around and begins walking back across the plaza, with the building's illuminated signage visible above.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban sidewalk with parked cars and street furniture

events.description: character exits plaza and returns to sidewalk along the street
passes by a pedestrian walking in the opposite direction

agents.ego_description: walking back along the sidewalk away from the building, passing street furniture and other pedestrians

parked dark sedan along the curb with brake lights on

entered.detail: concrete sidewalk with cracks and stains

yellow fire hydrant on the sidewalk edge

segments.scene_description: The character returns to the concrete sidewalk and walks away from the building complex, passing parked cars and a yellow fire hydrant. The modern glass office building now appears on the left side as the character continues down the street, passing another pedestrian walking in the opposite direction.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a modern downtown district at night, transitioning from a narrow sidewalk to an open plaza and back again. It begins with the character walking along a concrete sidewalk bordered by a stone wall and illuminated glass office buildings, briefly breaking into a run as they approach an intersection. As the character leaves the sidewalk, the scene opens up to a wide view of a multi-lane road filled with moving vehicles and palm trees, leading toward the prominent Didier Sachs building in the distance. The camera then follows the character across a grassy median and into a paved plaza, approaching the reflective glass entrance of the Harper Unit for Clinical Psychology before turning around to retreat from the building. Finally, the movement shifts back toward the street, passing parked cars and a yellow fire hydrant as the character returns to the sidewalk and continues past another pedestrian.
